writers.lyricist: Dan Reynolds/Wayne Sermon/Ben McKee/Daniel Platzman/Robin Fredriksson/Mattias Larsson
writers.composer: Dan Reynolds/Wayne Sermon/Ben McKee/Daniel Platzman/Robin Fredriksson/Mattias Larsson

lyrics.text: Gimme, gimme, gimme some time to think
I'm in the bathroom, looking at me
lyrics.translation: 我在浴室里 需要审视

lyrics.text: Face in the mirror is all I need (Ooh)
Wait until the reaper takes my life
Never gonna get me out alive
I will live a thousand million lives (Ooh)
My patience is waning
Is this entertaining?
Our patience is waning
Is this entertaining?
I-I-I got this feeling, yeah, you know
lyrics.translation: 你知道 我有这种感觉

lyrics.text: Where I'm losing all control
'Cause there's magic in my bones
I-I-I got this feeling in my soul
Go ahead and throw your stones
lyrics.translation: 尽管行使你的话语权吧

lyrics.text: 'Cause there's magic in my bones
Playing with a stick of dynamite
lyrics.translation: 我身处命悬一线的游戏

lyrics.text: There was never grey in black and white
lyrics.translation: 黑白世界没有灰色地带

lyrics.text: There was never wrong till there was right (Ooh, oh)
lyrics.translation: 标准出现之前也没有对错之分

lyrics.text: Feeling like a boulder hurtling
Seeing all the vultures circling
Burning in the flames I'm working in
Turning in a bed that's darkening
lyrics.translation: 天色灰蒙 我辗转在床上

lyrics.text: My patience is waning
Is this entertaining?
Our patience is waning
Is this entertaining?
I-I-I got this feeling, yeah, you know
lyrics.translation: 你知道 我有这种感觉

lyrics.text: Where I'm losing all control
'Cause there's magic in my bones (In my bones)
I-I-I got this feeling in my soul
Go ahead and throw your stones
lyrics.translation: 尽管行使你的话语权吧

lyrics.text: 'Cause there's magic in my bones
'Cause there's magic in my bones
Look in the mirror of my mind
Turning the pages of my life
Walking the path so many paced a million times
lyrics.translation: 无数次行走在这条道路上

lyrics.text: Drown out the voices in the air
Leaving the ones that never cared
lyrics.translation: 漠不关心的人离开就好

lyrics.text: Picking the pieces up and building to the sky
lyrics.translation: 拾起碎片 重建蓝天

lyrics.text: My patience is waning
Is this entertaining?
My patience is waning
Is this entertaining?
I-I-I got this feeling, yeah, you know
lyrics.translation: 你知道 我有这种感觉

lyrics.text: Where I'm losing all control
'Cause there's magic in my bones (Magic in my bones)
I-I-I got this feeling in my soul (Soul)
Go ahead and throw your stones
lyrics.translation: 尽管行使你的话语权吧

lyrics.text: 'Cause there's magic in my bones
There goes my mind (I-I-I)
Don't mind
There goes my mind (There it goes, there it goes)
There goes my mind (I-I-I)
Don't mind (There it goes)
There goes my mind
'Cause there's magic in my bones
